title: Airport Check-In
description: Check in for an international flight, drop a bag, and clarify carry-on rules.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning, are you flying with us today?

templates.text: Yes, I'm on the eleven thirty flight to Tokyo.
templates.hint_zh: 對,我搭十一點半飛東京的班機。

templates.text: Here you go. I have one bag to check.
templates.hint_zh: 在這裡,我有一件行李要託運。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Could you place it on the scale, please? Anything fragile or any spare batteries inside?

templates.text: Nothing fragile. The batteries are in my carry-on.
templates.hint_zh: 沒有易碎品,電池都放在隨身行李裡。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. Your bag is twenty-one kilos, you're good. Window or aisle seat?

templates.text: Aisle, please. I'd like to stretch my legs on a long flight.
templates.hint_zh: 走道,謝謝。長程飛行希望腿能伸展一下。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got you on 24C. Boarding starts at ten forty-five at gate B12.

templates.text: Great. How strict is the carry-on size limit today?
templates.hint_zh: 好的,今天隨身行李的尺寸要求嚴格嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Pretty strict on this route. If it doesn't fit the sizer at the gate, we'll have to check it.

templates.text: Got it, I'll repack a few things. Thanks for letting me know.
templates.hint_zh: 了解,我會重新整理一下行李,感謝提醒。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem. Have a great flight.

templates.text: Thanks, you too. See you on the way back!
